name: web_extract
description: Fetch a URL and extract structured records from it in one step. Prefer this over chaining fetch_html/web_read + extract_records when you start from a URL.

url.description: URL to fetch and extract records from.

schema.description: JSON Schema for ONE record; the tool returns an array of records.

max_pages.description: Follow rel=next or ?page=N up to this cap. Default 1; hard cap 5.

implementation_notes: GET with v0.8.20 polite headers (User-Agent + Accept); detects empty/soft-block bodies and returns degraded shape without an LLM call. Pagination added in T4.
